void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-validation-template-id&lbpmTmpId=route-validation-lbpm-template-id" fdId="route-validation-process-id" linesIndex="3" nodesIndex="4" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始节点" x="100" y="40"/> <draftNode id="N2" name="起草节点" mustModifyHandlerNodeIds="N3" x="100" y="100"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="handler-1" handlerNames="审批人" handlerSelectType="org" id="N3" ignoreOnHandlerEmpty="false" name="审批节点" processType="0" x="100" y="160"/> <endNode id="N4" name="结束节点" x="100" y="220"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N2" endPosition="1" id="L1" points="100,60;100,80" startNodeId="N1" startPosition="3"/> <line condition="$fd_type$ == "A"" disCondition="$类型$ == "类型A"" endNodeId="N3" endPosition="1" id="L2" name="类型A" points="100,120;100,140" priority="0" startNodeId="N2" startPosition="3"/> <line endNodeId="N4" endPosition="1" id="L3" points="100,180;100,200" startNodeId="N3" startPosition="3"/> </lines> </process>
<reviewNode canModifyFlow="false" handlerIds="handler-1" handlerNames="审批人" id="N3" name="审批节点"> <operations refId="op-review"/> </reviewNode>
